title: Sodoma #4670
definition:
Sodom = "burning"

 1) a city destroyed by the Lord raining fire and brimstone on it
 2) metaph. Jerusalem \\#Re 11:8\\
nasbUsage:

 1) a city destroyed by the Lord raining fire and brimstone on it
